title: pinguicula macrophylla
intro: Pinguicula macrophylla, also known as the large-leaved butterwort, is a carnivorous plant species belonging to the family Lentibulariaceae. It is native to the tropical and subtropical regions of Central and South America. Pinguicula macrophylla has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Pinguicula macrophylla include reducing inflammation and relieving respiratory issues, and it is often prepared as a tea or tincture for herbal remedies.
